name: Snowboard Kids 2
description: Work-in-progress decompilation of Snowboard Kids 2 (N64). Builds a byte-matching ROM from source — requires your own big-endian Snowboard Kids 2 ROM (.z64). The build verifies its output against your ROM; play it in your preferred N64 emulator.

romInfo.description: Select your big-endian Snowboard Kids 2 ROM (.z64). It is copied in as snowboardkids2.z64 and the build is verified against it.
